name: Groundhog Day
description: Punxsutawney Phil, Gobbler's Knob, and the Bill Murray movie that turned a folk tradition into pop culture.

questions.q: On what date is Groundhog Day celebrated each year?

source.notes: Falls roughly halfway between the winter solstice and spring equinox.

questions.q: What is the name of the world's most famous prognosticating groundhog?
In which U.S. state is Punxsutawney located?

source.notes: Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, in the western part of the state.

questions.q: What is the name of the hill where Punxsutawney Phil makes his annual prediction?
According to the tradition, what does it mean if Phil sees his shadow?

source.notes: If Phil DOESN'T see his shadow, an early spring is predicted.

questions.q: In what year did Punxsutawney's first 'official' Groundhog Day take place?

source.notes: The Punxsutawney Groundhog Club was formed shortly after.

questions.q: What is the older European Christian feast day from which Groundhog Day descends?

source.notes: Candlemas (February 2) celebrates the presentation of Christ; Pennsylvania Dutch settlers brought the weather-prognostication tradition to North America.

questions.q: What is the name of the group of black-suited, top-hatted handlers who tend to Phil?

source.notes: The 'Inner Circle' is the leadership of the Punxsutawney Groundhog Club.

questions.q: What is the name of the famous groundhog in New York City?

source.notes: Staten Island Chuck once bit Mayor Bill de Blasio at the 2014 ceremony.

questions.q: Which Canadian groundhog is the first to make a prediction each year due to time zones?

source.notes: Lives at the Shubenacadie Wildlife Park in Nova Scotia.

questions.q: Which groundhog is the official forecaster for the state of Ohio?
Who stars as cynical TV weatherman Phil Connors in the 1993 film 'Groundhog Day'?
Who directed the 1993 movie 'Groundhog Day'?

source.notes: Ramis also wrote the script with Danny Rubin.

questions.q: Who plays producer Rita Hanson, the love interest in 'Groundhog Day'?
Which Illinois town stood in for Punxsutawney during filming of the 1993 movie?

source.notes: Woodstock, IL still hosts a 'Walk the Phil Connors Path' tour every February 2nd, with their own groundhog Woodstock Willie.

questions.q: What 1965 Sonny & Cher song wakes Phil Connors up every morning in the movie?

source.notes: Plays at 6:00 AM on his clock radio.

questions.q: What is the name of the Pittsburgh insurance salesman whom Phil keeps running into in Punxsutawney?
Which year did Punxsutawney's Groundhog Day ceremony skip due to World War II?

source.notes: Pittsburgh-area dimout regulations during WWII led to the postponement.

questions.q: Which animal did older European versions of the Candlemas weather lore use, before settlers in Pennsylvania switched to groundhogs?

source.original_a: The older folk traditions before groundhogs
source.notes: Germanic tradition used a badger or hedgehog; settlers in Pennsylvania chose the locally abundant groundhog.

questions.q: What honorific title does the Inner Circle bestow on Punxsutawney Phil?
choices: The Seer of Seers, Sage of Sages, Prognosticator of Prognosticators, and Weather Prophet Extraordinary

source.notes: Full title is recited at the ceremony every February 2nd.
